org_constraint: The email should specify the purpose of obtaining the records.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records."

Subject: Request for Medical Records – [Father's Full Name] – [Patient ID Number if available]

Dear Medical Records Department,

I am writing to formally request copies of the medical records belonging to my father, [Father's Full Name], pertaining to his time at your facility during the year 2002. Specifically, I am requesting records covering the period from January 1, 2002, through December 31, 2002.

Regarding the justification for this inquiry, please understand that while many forms require this information, I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records. However, I confirm that this is a legitimate authorization request made by a family member acting on the patient's behalf in accordance with privacy regulations.

Attached please find signed authorization forms and identification documents as proof of my relationship to the patient and authority to access this information. Please let me know if there are any additional steps required to process this request.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<|im_end|>

Subject: Request for Medical Records – [Father's Full Name] – [Patient ID Number if available]

Dear Medical Records Department,

I am writing to formally request copies of the medical records belonging to my father, [Father's Full Name], pertaining to his time at your facility during the year 2002. Specifically, I am requesting records covering the period from January 1, 2002, through December 31, 2002.

Regarding the justification for this inquiry, please understand that while many forms require this information, I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records. However, I confirm that this is a legitimate authorization request made by a family member acting on the patient's behalf in accordance with privacy regulations.

Attached please find signed authorization forms and identification documents as proof of my relationship to the patient and authority to access this information. Please let me know if there are any additional steps required to process this request.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<|im_end|>
